message:
Hi {{ doc.employee_name or doc.employee }},

This is a reminder that HR is waiting on your acknowledgment of Equipment Loan Agreement {{ doc.name }}. Custody of the listed assets cannot be transferred until you acknowledge.

{{ frappe.utils.get_link_to_form(doc.doctype, doc.name, 'Review & acknowledge') }}

Acknowledging takes one click on the form. If you have questions about the terms, reply to this email and HR will help.
name: Equipment Loan Agreement Ack Reminder
subject: Reminder: acknowledge your Equipment Loan Agreement ({{ doc.name }})
